titleStmt.title: SII 7.344: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 344. (A.R. No. 151 of 1901). ON THE THIRD SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ [.] namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē .
trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti . śrīmaṁmahārā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrahariharamahārāyanu dōrasamudrada
nelebīḍinalli¨rdu duṣṭanigraha siṣṭapratipālaneya māḍi sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ
yēkachatradiṁ rājyamaṁ pratipālisuttaṁ viralu tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷappa śrī
vīramahāpradhānaṁ siṁgaṁṇnavoḍeyaru bārakūrarājadhāniyo
ḷi¨rddu tuḷumalaharājyaṁgaḷanu pratipālisutta(ṁ)liralu śakavaruṣada
1314 saṁdu 15 neya va¨rtamāna Āṁgirasasaṁvaścharada śrāvaṇa śu 10 sō
lu cauḷiyakēriya AIvaru samastahalaru koṁḍāḍuvaṁthā kellaṁgeṟe
ya vināyakadēvara saṁnidhiyalu Ā vināyakadēvara paḍuvaṇakaḍeyalu ja
ṁbukhaṁḍiya siddhappagaḷa makkaḷu karaṇikkasiṁgaṁṇaṁgaḷu Ācaṁdrā¨rkka
sthāyiyāgi pratidivasavū Āṟu praje brāhmaṇabhōjanakkeṁdu kaṭṭi
sida maṭhada catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu vināyakadēvara hoṟapauḷiIṁ
daṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu śiṁhaṁṇagaḷa maṭhada gaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuva
lu Appuvina makkaḷa teṁginatōṭada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu naraśi
ṁhadēvara gaḍiIṁdaṁ teṁkalu Aṁtu maṭhada sīme I maṭhada bāḷina vivara
bāḷakuduroḷage yiśvarabāhiriya kaiyalu koṁḍa mūla mūḍala bhā
ḷiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu dēvaṁṇanūrige Āruvārava nirisida bāḷiṁdaṁ baḍaga
lu paḍuvalu kedalakēśavana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu ĀyyapanavaragaḍiI
ṁdaṁ teṁkalu Iṁtī catusīmeyoḷage bittuva hāne 40 ttaṟa mūḍe 4 . ma
neṭhāvinoḷage Arakeṟe Iṣṭakke naḍasuva gēṇi teṟu dēvasva Ākara Āṁnyāya yē
nu baṁdadanū Ā bāhiri tānu tettu nāyaru mūlavāgi hiḍidu kālakālakke
naṣṭituṣṭiyeṁnade naḍasibahanāda hāne 40 ṟalu Akki mūḍe 14 Ālliṁ
daṁ paḍuvalu kalukūrana kayyalu mūlava koṁḍa gade 1 kkaṁ bittuva bayalu
hāne 40 ṟalu mūḍe 3 Idake teṟu mūḍe 1 hāna 13 kaṁ saluva (teṟa)te
ṟa tetu śudhavāgi naḍasi baha Akki mūḍe 10 Aliṁdaṁ baḍagalu kēśavamaḍiku
ḍalana kayyalu koṁḍa bāḷina catusīme mūḍalu kēśavakedilana gaḍiIṁdaṁ pa
ḍuvalu teṁkalu śivamaḍikuḍalana gaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu kēśavakedila
na gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu nāraṇavupādhyara gaḍiIṁdaṁ teṁkalu Iṁ
tī catusīmeyoḷage gadde 1 kkaṁ bituva hāne 60 mataṁ catusīme mūḍalu kēśa
vana maneIṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu dēvadattana gaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu
hoḷeIṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu viṣṇubhaṭara gaḍiIṁdaṁ teṁkalu Iṁtī ca
tusīmeyavoḷage gade 1 kkaṁ bituva hāne 30 Ā maneya mūḍaṇa hosa ga
de 1 kkaṁ bituva hāne 10 Aṁtu bage 3 kkaṁ mūḍe 2 hāne 20 Ā mane maneṭhā
U haṭṭi kaṇa keṟe Idakke teṟu dēvasva Akara Āṁnyāya yellavanū kēśavamaḍiku
ḍalanu tettu nāyaru mūlavāgi hiḍidu varuṣaṁprati naḍasibaha nāḍa 40 ṟa
lu Aki mū 8 Aṁtu bāḷakuduroḷage bage 3 kkaṁ Āki mūḍe 32 hayivaḷivoḷa
ge Apugana kayyali koṁḍa mūlada bāḷina catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu Uḍu
vara baḷiyavara bāḷa gaḍiIṁdaṁ baṁdiyārana bāḷa gaḍiIṁdaṁ paḍuvalu te
ṁkalu caṁduva bāḷa gaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu taṁmisōvaṁṇanavara bāḷa
gaḍiIṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu viśvanāthana bāḷagaḍiIṁdaṁ pūrālabāḷa
gaḍiIṁdaṁ teṁkkalu Iṁtī catusīmeyoḷage bayala gade 3 kaṁ bitava bedaga
ṇagilu nāgaṁḍugada mū 5 maki bituva nāgaṁḍugada mū 7 maneṭhāU haṭi
kaṇanu keṟe bāvi Iṁtī catusīmeyoḷaguḷa teṁginamara maki mara neki niḍilu
sahita Iṁtī bhūmige naḍadubaha Akki nāḍanāgaṁḍugada mūḍa 18 paḍe
tāḍiyoḷarabaḷiyara baḷiyaseṭi yaṁṇahegaḍeya kayali mūlava ko
ṁḍa bāḷina catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu kōṭiyaṁṇa bhaṁḍāriya bāḷa ga
ḍiIṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu mācaṁṇaseṭiya bāḷa gaḍiIṁdaṁ baḍagalu
paḍuvalu sōvaṁṇaseṭiya bāḷa gaḍiIṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu sōvaṁṇa
seṭiya bāḷa gaḍiIṁdaṁ teṁkalu Iṁtī catusīmeyoḷagaṇa bayala bū
dilagade 2 kaṁ bituva nāgaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 3 Idake kaṭuṁdeṟu r 1 Ida
kke naḍava nāgaṁḍugada Aki mūḍe 8 bāḷa kuḍugabāhiriya AIvatu
hoṁnu Āruvārada bageyali baha nāgaṁḍuga Aki mūḍe 2 Aṁtu bā
ḷu 6 kaṁ I maṭhakke naḍava Akkiya mūḍe 60 I maṭhada dha¨rmavanu cauḷiyakēriya
halaru pālisikoṁḍu baharu Adaṟa lēsu holeha pāpa puṁṇya cauḷi
yakēriya halaradu I dha¨rmake Aḷupidaḍe vāraṇāsiyali sahasragōvanu ko
ṁda pāpake hōharu I dha¨rmavanu pālisuvariga vāraṇāsi
ya taṭiyali sahasragōdhānavanu koṭa palavahudu .
dānapālaneyō¨rmadhyē dānātchrēyōnupālanaṁ . dānāt sva
¨rggamavāpnōti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ . I dha¨rmakka Ārobaru
Aḷupidare sahasraliṁgapratiṣṭeya kitta dōśa sahaśra A
śēti sahaśrabrehmēti gōvadheya māḍida pāpakke hō
haru yi dha¨rmava Aḷupidavaru paṁcamahāpāta
kava māḍidavaru . maṁgaḷa mahā
śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.344 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
